features.name: synthesis_translate_off_directive_in_initial
features.description: Code should include a synthesis translate_off directive placed inside an initial procedural block

features.name: synthesis_translate_on_directive_in_initial
features.description: Code should include a synthesis translate_on directive placed inside an initial procedural block

features.name: synthesis_directive_pair_around_assignment
features.description: Code should include a synthesis translate_off/translation_on directive pair surrounding a procedural assignment
